subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is established upon the throne of His oneness, and from Whose garden of divine mercy the gentle breezes of intimacy continuously waft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن استقر علی سریر وحدانیته و استمرت نسائم الانس من حدیقه رحمانیته و هاج
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
